name: Chicken & Clam Spread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound cream cheese, softened at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain clams and set aside the liquid.
2. Mix the clams, chicken, and cream cheese together.
3. Add enough of the clam liquid to make the mixture smooth.
4. Add onion, mayonnaise, salt, and pepper to the mixture. Mix well.
5. Place approximately 1 teaspoon full on each melba toast round.
6. Sprinkle with a little parsley for color. Garnish (other than parsley) is not included in this recipe's total nutritional information.
